name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: VoteVets is suing the Trump administration
body:
Activist -

VoteVets is suing the Trump administration and we need your help to blow this story wide open. Here's why:

Shortly after the election, Trump essentially installed three members of Mar-a-Lago as shadow rulers of the Department of Veterans Affairs. His golf buddies.

Not kidding.

There was no formal appointment. They have no background with veterans' health care or houselessness or job training. They just belong to Trump's club. And VA appointees and employees are expected to report to them.

So we're suing to stop this travesty. But there's also going to be House Committee hearings on the issue. And that's why we're asking:

[**Sign VoteVets ' petition: tell House Veterans' Affairs Committee Chair, Mark Takano, you stand with him in calls for an investigation and hearings into Trump's golf buddies' role in running the Department of Veterans Affairs.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/G4DzU/6/ny/r5cs/6hPy5V/sVqOjRK0f/P/P/5V)

The health and safety of America's veterans isn't a game for President Trump's Mar-a-Lago members to play with between rounds of golf or over shrimp cocktails. It's not just insulting that veterans were forced to sue the Trump administration to have a voice in its veterans' policies, it's dangerous.

All our best,

The team at VoteVets ****[ADD YOUR NAME](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/G4DzU/s/ny/r5cs/6hPy5V/Ee84zMTlJ/P/P/5V "http://action.votevets.org/page/s/no-parade?source=Dem180228-full")**** P.S. VoteVets is the largest organization of progressive veterans, military family members and their civilian supporters. We run some of the hardest hitting ads out there and last cycle spent more money to elect a Congress that will stand up to Trump than almost any other organization. [**Join us in this fight to stop Trump 's appointment of shadow rulers to the VA.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/G4DzU/v/ny/r5cs/6hPy5V/zdjI0taAXv/P/P/5V)

---
Paid for VoteVets Political Action Committee.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDg0LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjkzOTM5NDAx)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Lara Trump
subject: Double Entry 🔓
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
President Trump thought of YOU first. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2dabe21f6d3418ff1a6e16924dec534d5daa45037a1affa0427801f06956126b9c125ef54febfb518c00bc60e64b671a3781f7be521268d3)
---

Friend,

The President is hosting a breakfast in beautiful Florida, to spend time with some of his best supporters.

We've put together a very special sweepstakes, and because you've been such an important part of our movement, _**you 've unlocked a special double-entry. **_

| **[Any contribution made in the next 24 HOURS will enter your name TWICE!](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2dabe21f6d3418ffb6b5c1ded5268b2d9f4a1725f640989180380c7f72df636682088c967ffd8627726b570da12d7a4c68f1643b520ede08)**

** [CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2dabe21f6d3418ffc872000097775bc7c0eaf714ae33115f36cf3027704afd5de729c81a157c778e6c3ba1da0fc334e462fe2b320d5434ea)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2dabe21f6d3418ff822290ff9fd8c9d941c26bf9b00606c334c9637a83b8358f443ccbb6d69e0a0099ea41d283e67d6923a881e8275b9239)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2dabe21f6d3418ff3f3c902f268f21ddde4e4931bf8ce239938b4123bf3d6c36923c0d5c543d2b876b2cee337eee393842d59d4ab512eb80)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2dabe21f6d3418ff283b9803f21dcc630b6e8e35911f111c62b8b45ff35c958cf983555caed06065fadddedf31e6882633c39b0cc34e6f2f)** ** [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2dabe21f6d3418ff6ffe313fb6e2e26c278c55404e03bdf20c9c97d4c36ef96726b39185acc2f1536797068292dd325c3fb82e697ea36260)**
The President wanted to be sure you were on the double-entry list, Friend, and he'd love to meet you and take a picture to remember the moment forever.

_**[Just contribute $3 to be automatically entered to win.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2dabe21f6d3418ff26d364c91241b6006b6727610e44dceb2478742c3af42448a68a40edf88c25e1b495ba68d1aed634d3f6c07755dc6d38)**_

Thank you,

Lara Trump
Senior Advisor,
Donald J. Trump for President, 2020

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: A moment for gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a17/2ae112ef/11bb8cde/357ae823/2965514555/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a17/2ae112ef/11bb8cde/357ae823/2965514555/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
After my first full month on the campaign trail, I wanted to write to say thank you. Everywhere I go, I'm struck by how generous everyone is--with your support, your time and your stories.
We've been fortunate to see and do a lot since we started getting out and meeting with people. Jonathan and Henry came along for a trip to New Hampshire. I introduced Henry at one event and he stood up and said, "To all the other kids in here: Who wants to have a dance party?" And he led them outside in a line.
It was a good reminder: As we run, we're going to have fun doing it.
I've been welcomed into bakeries and women-owned shops in Iowa. I visited a farmer's market on a beautiful day in South Carolina and was invited to speak at a church on Sunday morning.
Everywhere I've been, I've asked: What should government be doing that it isn't? The first thing people want is to feel like their leaders are listening to them. Under the current president, we've gotten away from that.
As your president, I'll get us back there. I hear in questions the fear and uncertainty over the future. It comes up a lot in connection with the Green New Deal. It's often the first, second and third question people ask. There's a palpable urgency and understanding this might be our last chance to save our planet before we run out of time. We _can_ transform our economy and protect our natural resources, but we have to act fast, and we will. I'm running like it, and I'll govern like it.
I got into the race to fight alongside you and everyone who's been speaking out but not being listened to. I decided to do it without help from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists or an individual super PAC, because I wanted this campaign to be about us. Your stories, your fights and your communities.
That's why we've rejected the dark money that's corrupted our election system and that's sent people into office just because they bought their way in. And it's why your support has been central to building our momentum. Whatever you've given--whether $5, $20 or $50--it's a campaign contribution, but it's also so much more. It's the building blocks of a movement.
I'm deeply grateful for all your support. We're fighting to change the country, pursue justice and do what's right for our future. And I believe that together, no one can stop us.
Thank you,

Kirsten

Kirsten has the most anti-Trump record in the Senate and was called the president's "biggest foe" by Congressional Quarterly. But to win the primary, defeat Trump and restore courage and compassion to our country's leadership, she needs your support. ****[Will you make an urgent donation to elect Kirsten, root out corruption and secure progressive victories like the Green New Deal and Medicare for All?](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a17/2ae112ef/11bb8cde/357ae822/2965514555/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI4Mzctb3QtZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2837-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a17/2ae112ef/11bb8cde/357ae82d/2965514555/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Back from the Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kinzinger for Congress
body:
| [ ](www.electadam.com)
---
Friend, I'm just back from flying missions on our southern border. My Air National Guard squadron was called up to active duty a few weeks ago, and it was an eye-opening experience. I'll keep it simple -- the situation on our border is a crisis. I've never seen it this bad. I wish every doubter could see what my squadron and I did: Cartels bringing tons of deadly drugs into our country; human traffickers smuggling desperate people, sometimes abandoning them in the desert (we saved a woman who had been left to die); and countless other breaches at the weakest points on our border. It's a nightmare down there. I recently discussed the situation with Brian Kilmeade on Fox News Radio - listen to our conversation by clicking below: [](https://www.electadam.com/border?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019_03_02_border&n=1 "Elect Adam - BORDER") Look, I get that some people can't handle agreeing with the President. If he says "up," they say "down." If he says "Build the Wall," they claim border security is "Immoral." If he says "there's a crisis," they say it's "manufactured." But I can tell you from firsthand experience, and as someone who has had some disagreements with our President: This crisis is real. If we're going to secure our border and save countless lives, we've got to rise above politics and do what's best for our country. That means waking up to the reality that we have a major problem, and it's going to take Republicans and Democrats working together to solve it. And yes, that solution has to include new barriers along our border. If you agree, make sure you add your name to our official SECURE THE BORDER petition by [clicking here](https://www.electadam.com/border?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019_03_02_border&n=2). Every additional voice makes a difference, and it helps to know you have my back while I'm fighting to get the truth out in Washington, DC. [SIGN THE PETITION](https://www.electadam.com/border?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019_03_02_border&n=3) Thanks for hearing me out with an open mind, Adam
| [ ](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6vqT3OpPWah76AO06wwwFqJ-xxr4keELV2d4JdHAmLhp&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019_03_02_border&n=4) [ ](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNCDBgQphekXkJc2K3uZrHWcCkDncOztAEg2HCUvnwt8g&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019_03_02_border&n=5)
---
Paid for by Kinzinger for Congress
Kinzinger for Congress · PO Box 2365, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.future1st.us/unsubscribe?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019_03_02_border&n=6).
You can also keep up with Adam Kinzinger on [Twitter](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNCDBgQphekXkJc2K3uZrHWcCkDncOztAEg2HCUvnwt8g&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019_03_02_border&n=7) or [Facebook](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6vqT3OpPWah76AO06wwwFqJ-xxr4keELV2d4JdHAmLhp&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019_03_02_border&n=8).
